page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c28g1.14xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.gn5 family. It features 56 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, providing 56 vCPUs. The instance is equipped with 224.0 GB of system memory, translating to 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

For hardware acceleration, the instance includes two NVIDIA P100 GPUs, delivering a combined total of 32 GB of VRAM. Local storage is bundled with a 944 GB SSD, and network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The underlying virtualization is managed via the KVM hypervisor.

This hardware profile is designed for workloads requiring parallel processing capabilities alongside dedicated CPU resources. The combination of dual NVIDIA P100 GPUs, 56 dedicated cores, and local SSD storage makes it suitable for deep learning training, scientific computing, high-performance databases, and GPU-accelerated rendering pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c28g1.14xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance from the ecs.gn5 family, utilizing the KVM hypervisor on the x86_64 architecture. It is configured with 56 dedicated physical cores (56 vCPUs) and 224.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance features two NVIDIA P100 GPUs with a total of 32 GB VRAM, alongside 944 GB of local SSD storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. This resource density makes it suitable for parallel computing tasks, including deep learning, rendering, and database workloads requiring dedicated CPU and GPU resources.
